Discover
10
Years
Our Story

A Legacy of
South Indian Flavour

AURUM was born from a singular vision — to elevate authentic South Indian cuisine into a refined fine dining experience. Nestled in the heart of Madurai, we honour traditions passed down through generations of Tamil culinary heritage.

Our kitchen is led by Chef Annamalai Rajan, whose journey across Tamil Nadu's most celebrated temples of taste now finds its fullest expression at our table.

Our Seasonal Menu

Ven Pongal

Chettinad Chicken Curry

Signature
Banana Leaf Meals
Steamed rice, rasam, three curries, kootu, papad, pickle, payasam — the full spread

Madurai Mutton Kuzhambu

₹450

Madurai Wheat Halwa

Guest Experiences

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"The Chettinad chicken here is unlike anything else in Madurai. The masala is deep, layered, and impossibly aromatic. This is the finest South Indian dining experience I have ever had."

R
Rajesh Subramaniam
February 2025
★★★★★

"The banana leaf meals took me straight back to my grandmother's kitchen — but elevated to something truly luxurious. The sakkarai pongal for dessert was divine."

P
Priya & Karthik Nair
January 2025
★★★★★

"From the degree filter coffee to the wheat halwa, every item spoke of deep culinary heritage. The ambience is warm and elegant. AURUM is a jewel in Madurai's dining scene."

A
Anand Venkatesh
December 2024
